properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I feel it in my bones, You're about to move I feel it in the wind, You're about to ride in You said that You would pour Your spirit out You said that You would fall on sons and daughters So come

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I feel it in my bones, You're about to move I feel it in the wind, You're about to ride in You said that You would pour Your spirit out You said that You would fall on sons and daughters

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So like the rain, come drench us in love And let Your glory rush in like a flood

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And we are fixed on this one thing To know Your goodness and see Your glory. We're transformed by this one thing To know Your presence and see Your beauty

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I can see it now, Your kingdom come I can hear it now, the sounds of heaven. You said that if we ask, we'll receive So we are asking for the greater measure.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: So like the rain, come drench us in love Let Your power rush in like a flood

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Yeah, we are fixed on this one thing To know Your goodness, see Your glory Oh, we're transformed by this one thing To know Your presence and see Your beauty

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: So come and blow on through Spirit move, we're ready for You To come and blow on through And come and do what only You can do

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: So come and blow on through, yes And Spirit move, we're ready for You To come and blow on through And come and do, yeah, what only You can do

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: And we are fixed on this one thing To know Your goodness and see Your glory Oh, we're transformed by this one thing To know Your presence and see Your beauty

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Oh, we are fixed on this one thing To know Your goodness and see Your glory Oh, we're transformed by this one thing To know Your presence and see Your beauty
